chk_age_range.name: chk_age_range
chk_age_range.value: max_age IS NULL OR max_age >= min_age

chk_temporal_range.name: chk_temporal_range
chk_temporal_range.value: expiration_date IS NULL OR expiration_date >= effective_date

idx_profiles_employee.name: idx_profiles_employee
idx_profiles_employee.where: employee_code IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

chk_vacancy_dates.name: chk_vacancy_dates
chk_vacancy_dates.value: closing_date IS NULL OR publication_date IS NULL OR closing_date >= publication_date
